title: Team Tagger
body:
# Team Tagger

## Introduction
> **Adds a team/enemy seperate & filtering feature via slash commands.**  
> If you've want ever confused who is your team and enemies, this is perfect for you!

## Features
- Toggle team & enemy nametags on/off via slash command
- Change nametag colors via slash command (providing RGB color code)
- Save & Load with config based on json

## Commands
- Basic prefix : `/tt`   
  - `add [username]` : Adds player to team list.
  - `remove [username]` : Removes player from team list.
  - `teamcolor [color]` : Changes team name color to provided one.
  - `enemycolor [color]` : Changes enemy name color to provided one.
  - `teamtag [on/off]` : Toggles rendering team player's nametag.
  - `enemytag [on/off]` : Toggles rendering enemy player's nametag.

## FAQ
- Why should I use it?   
  **-> `It is perfect for war servers (or pvp servers) that has team system.`**
- How does it work?   
  **-> `It uses rendering mixin for filtering players via their type(team/enemy).`**
- Where it could be used?   
  **-> `It can be used in any server, and it is client-side utility. (I recommend you if you have team or team-like system in the server that you're playing!`**
- What type of color code should I provide?
  **-> `RRGGBB or #RRGGBB (ex. FFFFFF or #FFFFFF`**

## Dependencies
- [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)
- [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu) (Optional)

## Credits
> *Developed & Maintained solely by [kop](https://modrinth.com/user/kop)*
